title: isolepis cernua var. meruensis
intro: Isolepis cernua var. meruensis, also known as Meru needle sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Meru needle sedge include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or salves, and it can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to affected areas.
